response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong technical leadership with 14+ years of diverse software development experience, including roles in developer tooling (AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators) and system design. However, her people-management experience is less documented (no explicit team-lead roles in recent roles), and her mobile-platform knowledge is unclear. The resume shows deep expertise in backend systems and testing but lacks direct evidence of strategic roadmap planning or cross-team alignment at scale.
strengths: Extensive experience in developer tooling and infrastructure (AI-agent frameworks, build systems, CI/CD)
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through mentorship (workshops, code katas, Selenium courses)
Proven ability to design and maintain complex systems (GISCollective, low-latency microservices, Kubernetes deployments)
concerns: Limited explicit people-management experience (only inferred from workshops/mentorship, not formal leadership)
No clear evidence of mobile-platform knowledge or direct experience with developer tools for mobile ecosystems
Recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz) focus more on general software engineering than specialized developer tooling
